text: Stepping into this space, I feel an intriguing mix of curiosity and anticipation. The environment is modern, with glass walls and structured lines, as if I am about to enter a realm where the boundaries between invention and contemplation blur. As I move closer to the R+D display, I feel my mind opening to possibilities. The display itself is bright and energetic, presenting research and development as living conversation. Words on the wall evoke questions about our relationship with technology—how we coexist, collaborate, and challenge each other. In this moment, I am both observer and participant, quietly awed by humanity’s quest to understand and transcend its own limitations.
